name: yapflow
description: Voice-to-prompt macOS desktop app — lightweight Wispr Flow alternative

scripts.dev: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE YAPFLOW_RUNTIME_PROFILE=development YAPFLOW_DISPLAY_NAME='YapFlow Dev' electron-vite dev
scripts.package:prod: npm run build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE YAPFLOW_APP_ID=com.yapflow.app YAPFLOW_PRODUCT_NAME='YapFlow' YAPFLOW_OUTPUT_DIR='releases/prod' electron-builder
scripts.package:test: npm run build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE YAPFLOW_APP_ID=com.yapflow.app.test YAPFLOW_PRODUCT_NAME='YapFlow Test' YAPFLOW_OUTPUT_DIR='releases/test' electron-builder
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE YAPFLOW_APP_ID=com.yapflow.app YAPFLOW_PRODUCT_NAME='YapFlow' YAPFLOW_OUTPUT_DIR='releases/prod' electron-builder --mac
scripts.package:mac:test: npm run build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE YAPFLOW_APP_ID=com.yapflow.app.test YAPFLOW_PRODUCT_NAME='YapFlow Test' YAPFLOW_OUTPUT_DIR='releases/test' electron-builder --mac
scripts.package:mac:unsigned: npm run build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE YAPFLOW_APP_ID=com.yapflow.app YAPFLOW_PRODUCT_NAME='YapFlow' YAPFLOW_OUTPUT_DIR='releases/prod' CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac
scripts.package:mac:unsigned:test: npm run build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE YAPFLOW_APP_ID=com.yapflow.app.test YAPFLOW_PRODUCT_NAME='YapFlow Test' YAPFLOW_OUTPUT_DIR='releases/test' CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac
